note: Play Hand outcome priors are a second-layer policy overlay derived from clean batch outcomes. They do not overwrite empirical validation scores.

classification_rules: template_guarded: exact_selected_rate >= 0.40, or count >= 5 with promotion_rate >= 0.90, comparable_template_runs >= 5, and avg_mutation_delta <= -5
unstable: otherwise; productive unstable families use softened sampling policy
